jd_text: About Us: We’re building an ecosystem of digital products and services that power everyday life across the Middle East—fast, scalable, and deeply customer-centric. Our mission is to ring every doorbell, everyday. We want to redefine what technology can do in this region, and we’re looking for a Head of Creative Strategy who can help us move even faster. What you’ll do: The Creative Strategy function sits at the core of how noon shows up to customers — driving high-impact campaigns, creative execution, and brand storytelling across all markets and platforms. This role requires someone who can own end-to-end creative output, from ideation through to execution, and translate business priorities into campaigns that drive growth. You’ll work closely with the CEO, acting as a creative operator, strategist, and force multiplier. You will lead campaign development, shape creative direction, and ensure execution across digital, media, and on-ground channels is best-in-class. This role is built for someone with real creative leadership instinct, sharp thinking, and the ability to operate in fast-paced, high-pressure environments. You should be able to develop strong campaign ideas independently and drive them through to execution with high standards. Key responsibilities include: Lead the development of breakthrough campaign ideas-from concept through to execution Own end-to-end campaign delivery across digital ads, media, social, and key commercial moments Translate business priorities into high-impact creative platforms that drive measurable outcomes Drive hero campaigns across key moments (Ramadan, sale events, growth pushes) Oversee creative production including ad films, digital content, and campaign assets Bring strong filmmaking sensibility — storytelling, pacing, and visual direction Ensure high-quality, fast-moving, performance-driven execution across all channels Shape and evolve noon’s creative direction and tone of voice Drive execution across ATL, BTL, digital, and on-ground activations Work closely with internal teams, agencies, and production partners to deliver at scale Partner with CEO / GrowCo and business leaders on high-priority growth initiatives Build and lead a culture of creative excellence, ownership, and high standards What We’re Looking For: 10–15+ years of experience in creative strategy, advertising, or campaign leadership roles Proven track record of delivering high-impact, full-funnel campaigns Strong creative instinct and independent ideation ability Deep understanding of campaign development across digital, performance, and brand marketing Strong production and filmmaking sensibility Comfortable operating both strategically and hands-on Experience working in fast-paced, high-growth environments Strong interpersonal skills — able to work across creative, marketing, product, and leadership teams High ownership — able to drive ideas from concept to execution without drop-off Comfortable working under pressure with tight timelines and high expectations Detail-oriented, with a strong focus on quality and output Commercially aware — understands how creativity drives performance and growth Bonus Points If You Have: Experience in e-commerce, tech, or digital-first businesses Strong portfolio of ad films, campaigns, or large-scale creative work Experience working across multiple markets or culturally diverse audiences Prior experience working closely with founders or CEO offices Who will excel? We’re looking for people with high creative standards who understand that great work requires both ideas and execution. You need to be relentlessly resourceful, with a strong bias for action and the ability to move quickly from concept to output. We value individuals with the confidence to push bold ideas, challenge thinking, and raise the bar on creative quality. Success here requires speed, resilience, and the ability to operate in ambiguity while delivering consistently high-quality work.
